requiredDisclosures.text: ApprovalPrep is self-service. You review and send your own documents.
ApprovalPrep does not guarantee approval, deletion, correction, funding, housing, or any decision.
Use only truthful, supportable information and keep your own copy trail.
ApprovalPrep is not a law firm, credit repair company, lender, landlord, or credit bureau.
Attach or retain supporting documents only when they are truthful and relevant.
